title: Employee Offboarding Lite
description: Offboarding checklist, asset return and account revocation in one small flow — approval included, rebuilt from a single prompt.
description_cn: 离职清单、资产归还、账号回收一条小流程串起来,内置审批,一段提示词即可复刻。
description_ja: 退職チェックリスト、資産返却、アカウント停止をひとつの小さなフローに。プロンプトひとつで再現。

tags.title: Internal-Tools
tags.description_ja: 内部ツールに関する説明はここに記載されます。
tags.keywords_ja: 内部, ツール, 管理

author: NocoBase Team
prompt:
You are connected to a NocoBase instance with data-modeling and UI-building tools.

Build a lightweight employee offboarding module:

1. Collections:
   - offboarding_requests: request_no, employee_name, department (input), last_working_day (date), reason (textarea), status (select: drafted/submitted/approved/completed)
   - return_items: request (m2o -> offboarding_requests), item_name, returned (checkbox)
   - account_revocations: request (m2o -> offboarding_requests), system_name, revoked (checkbox)
2. Pages: an "Offboarding" page with the requests table; view popup shows the request details plus its return items and account revocations as relation tables.
3. Workflow: when a request is approved, create default return_items (laptop, badge, key) and account_revocations (email, ERP) rows for it.
4. Required: employee_name, last_working_day.

Use English for all seed data. Create 2 sample requests in different statuses.
